label: Journey Entry
description: Day-journal entries persisted by FRanC via /kb-persist journey (DESIGN.md §5.5). Identity by title (CASE-310 corrects CASE-309's flat_file_mirror choice — the durable atomic identifier per template, not the filename string). FRanC's day-numbering convention prepends 'Day N:' to every journal title, making titles unique by construction. journey_date and day_number are non-identity fields for sort/filter only.
